title: Memphis Design & Code: A Conversation with Charise Hansen: Introducing Uncomplicated, Inc.

location.name: Crews Center for Entrepreneurship, 2nd Floor - University of Memphis

summary: Join us at the Crews Center for an evening with Charise Hansen from Uncomplicated Inc. as she shares demos of applications and tools their team has built, along with insights into the development process, collaboration, and technologies used to bring those ideas to life.

description.whoIsThisFor: UI/UX designers, software engineers, or aspiring developers who want to level up their web game and understand performance-focused development.

agenda.details: Grab some food and meet new faces.

This session will be a more hands-on look into real projects, practical workflows, and the tools used by a growing software company. Whether you're interested in development, startups, product creation, or learning how teams turn ideas into working applications, this will be a great opportunity to learn from professionals actively building in the industry.
A space to share projects, ask follow-up questions, and connect with the community.

rsvp.details: Please confirm your attendance via this Meetup page so we can get an accurate headcount for food.

stayConnected: Learn more about Design and Code at our website - www.memphisdesignandcode.com
